description.description: Defines the description of the Neptune cluster parameter group, providing context for its purpose or configuration.

family.description: Specifies the Neptune engine version for the parameter group; must match the engine version of the cluster.

name.description: Name of the Neptune cluster parameter group. Must be unique within the AWS account and follow naming conventions.

name_prefix.description: Specifies a prefix for the name of the Neptune cluster parameter group, which must be unique within the AWS account and region.

parameter.description: Defines custom parameters for the Neptune cluster, allowing you to modify database settings to optimize performance and behavior.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to categorize and organize the parameter group.
